name: Proxy-Cheap
description: Proxy-Cheap ordering API for discovering residential/mobile/static services, validating service-specific options, calculating exact prices, purchasing proxies, and retrieving fulfilled proxy credentials. Purchase tools spend account funds; always calculate a price immediately before execution.

credential_fields.name: api_secret
credential_fields.label: API secret
credential_fields.description: Secret paired with the Proxy-Cheap API key.

tools.name: list_orderable_services
tools.description: List current orderable services and plan IDs. Start every purchase workflow here; service and plan identifiers are provider-defined and may change.

tools.name: get_order_options
tools.description: Get valid configuration options for one service and optional plan. Different services return different properties; use the response to build price_order.

tools.name: price_order
tools.description: Calculate total, subtotal, discounts, and unit prices for a service configuration. This does not purchase anything. Include service-specific fields returned by get_order_options.

traffic.description: Traffic in GB for rotating residential/mobile services.

tools.name: execute_order
tools.description: Purchase proxies using a configuration already checked with price_order. This spends account funds and may enable recurring auto-extension. Do not retry on a timeout until get_order confirms whether an order was created.

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Get fulfillment and payment status for an order returned by execute_order.

tools.name: get_order_proxies
tools.description: Get the proxy endpoints and credentials created for a fulfilled order. Treat returned credentials as secrets.
